title: DefiLlama
mainTitle: Aggregated DeFi data — TVL, fees, prices & yields
subtitle: Key-free DeFi decision data for agent research, pricing and risk.
description:
## What it does

DefiLlama gateway over x402: read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics, multi-chain current & historical token prices with charts, and DeFi pool yields/APY — all key-free, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents doing DeFi research, allocation and risk screening that need TVL / fees / stablecoin data.
- Pricing and valuation workflows that need multi-chain current and historical token prices.
- Yield scouting across pools by APY, TVL and risk.

## Endpoints

- `GET /protocols` — All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — Current total TVL of a protocol (lightweight)
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated)
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — Price chart (time series) for one or many coins
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins
- `GET /pools` — All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id

## Code usage

These routes are key-free passthroughs — call the gateway URL directly. TRON Mainnet (`exact_gasfree`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/...`.

If a route becomes priced, pay it with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001
```
useCase: Use to read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics for DeFi research, allocation or risk screening.

zh-CN.title: DefiLlama
zh-CN.subtitle: 免 key 的 DeFi 决策数据,供 Agent 研究、定价与风控。
zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DefiLlama 的 x402 网关:读取协议 TVL、费用/收入与稳定币指标,多链代币现价+历史价+图表,以及 DeFi 资金池收益率/APY——全部免 key,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC 两条付费路由。

## 适合场景

- 需要 TVL/费用/稳定币数据做 DeFi 研究、配置与风险筛查的 Agent。
- 需要多链现价与历史价的定价/估值流程。
- 按 APY、TVL 与风险挑选资金池。

## 接口

- `GET /protocols` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocols`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/protocol/{slug}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/tvl/{protocol}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/prices/current/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/chart/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/percentage/{coins}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /pools` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/pools`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — 通过 gateway 调用 `/chart/{pool}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。

## 调用示例

这些是免 key 直通路由,直接请求网关 URL 即可。TRON 主网(`exact_gasfree`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

同一路径在 BSC(`eip155:56`,`exact_permit`)上也提供。如该路由变收费,用 x402 CLI 付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001
```
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。
zh-CN.mainTitle: 聚合 DeFi 数据 — TVL、费用、价格、收益率
